page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: The MLST pipeline developed by the PathOGiST research group.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A MLST caller based on a k-mer counting algorithm and written in the Julia language, specifically designed and implemented to handle large typing schemes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A MLST caller based on a k-mer counting algorithm and written in the Julia language, specifically designed and implemented to handle large typing schemes.
